subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of the earth! Oppose not Him in Whose heart naught dwelleth save the effulgence of the lights of the Mystic Morn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اهل الارض لاتتعرضوا بالذی لم یکن فی قلبه الا تجلی من انوار صبح العماء
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @belief and denial, @light and darkness, @love as fire, @love of God
